_meta.description: Per-category AI creative rules for Flow Director ad generation. Consumed by carousel_flow.py and flow_agent.py.

electronics.lighting_style: soft studio key light, subtle rim light, no harsh shadows, high-key for white bg / low-key for dark bg
electronics.camera_style: macro product detail, floating product perspective, center composition with massive negative space
electronics.pacing: slow reveal → product hero → detail macro → logo/CTA. 2s-2s-2s-2s rhythm.
electronics.emotional_trigger: aspiration + control — 'this is what premium feels like'
electronics.prompt_prefix: minimalist product photography, Apple-style, clean studio lighting, floating product, white background, commercial quality
electronics.prompt_suffix: 8K, ultra-sharp, professional product shot, no text, no watermark

fashion.lighting_style: dramatic side lighting, high contrast, hard shadows on concrete, golden hour for outdoor
fashion.camera_style: dynamic low angle, off-center composition, product in motion/action context, slight Dutch angle
fashion.pacing: impact open → dynamic motion → product detail → bold CTA. 1.5s-2.5s-2s-2s rhythm.
fashion.emotional_trigger: empowerment + identity — 'this is who you become'
fashion.prompt_prefix: Nike campaign aesthetic, dramatic product photography, urban concrete background, high contrast lighting, bold composition
fashion.prompt_suffix: cinematic, 8K, commercial quality, no text, no watermark, no people

beauty.lighting_style: soft diffused beauty lighting, warm golden accents, dewy highlight reflections, butterfly lighting setup
beauty.camera_style: extreme macro on texture (cream, serum droplets), product at slight angle, shallow DOF
beauty.pacing: texture ASMR open → product reveal → application result → emotional close. 2s-2s-2s-2s rhythm.
beauty.prompt_prefix: luxury skincare photography, macro texture detail, soft golden lighting, marble surface, dewy water droplets, spa aesthetic
beauty.prompt_suffix: editorial beauty, 8K, ultra-sharp macro, no text, no watermark, no people

home.lighting_style: warm natural window light, soft directional shadows, golden hour warmth, hygge ambiance
home.camera_style: lifestyle context shot, product in-situ on kitchen counter/bedside/shelf, styled scene with complementary props
home.pacing: room establishing → zoom to product → detail/feature → lifestyle benefit. 2s-2s-2s-2s rhythm.
home.emotional_trigger: comfort + upgrade — 'small change, big daily impact'
home.prompt_prefix: Scandinavian interior photography, warm natural light, product on wood surface, cozy home scene, lifestyle context
home.prompt_suffix: editorial home, 8K, warm tones, no text, no watermark, no people

fitness.lighting_style: high contrast directional, sweat-glow highlight, dramatic rim light, gymnasium ambient
fitness.camera_style: dynamic angle, slight motion blur on background, product frozen in action, low perspective
fitness.pacing: explosive open → action freeze → product hero → intensity close. 1s-2.5s-2.5s-2s rhythm.
fitness.emotional_trigger: performance + grit — 'gear that matches your effort'
fitness.prompt_prefix: dynamic fitness product photography, gym environment, high contrast, dramatic lighting, concrete texture, motion energy
fitness.prompt_suffix: athletic commercial, 8K, cinematic, no text, no watermark, no people

global_rules.always_include: product must be recognizable, no AI hallucination of product design
global_rules.image_source_rule: website thumbnails = REAL Amazon images ONLY. AI generation = ads/social/video ONLY.
